description: Aviationstack is an APILayer product that provides global aviation data, including real-time and historical flight information, schedules, routes, airports, airlines, aircraft, cities, countries, and aviation taxes. It is used to power flight tracking, booking, visualization, and analytics applications.
summary: Aviationstack exposes one documented REST API at `https://api.aviationstack.com/v1`, authenticated with an `access_key` query parameter; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
